arts.ttl: PSG’s Ousmane Dembélé absent from training and set to miss Strasbourg tie
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé (27) has not trained since picking up a hamstring injury against Arsenal and he remains touch-and-go to feature in the second-leg of the UEFA Champions League semi-final against…
